title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 24 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose 1.3% in the day, the main contract closed 818.the quotation in the morning was increased by 10 yuan/mt overyesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand. PBF at Shandong port dealt 950 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
